---
title: "OECD iLibrary"
page-layout: article
---

# OECD iLibrary

**Provider:** OECD

## Description

OECD platform providing books, reports, journals, and statistical data on economics, policy, development, education, environment, and society. Supports comparative policy research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Government & International Statistics, Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Government & International Statistics, Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb975)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
